notes: swift build --target SpeakCore blocked by os.log on Linux (AudioBufferPool)
Sentry binary blocks swift test on Linux - macOS CI needed
os.log and SwiftUI/CloudKit block swift test on Linux entirely
AppSettingsDefaultsTests uses custom UserDefaults suite via DI - SettingsSync uses singleton so tearDown cleanup used instead
ConfigTransferPayload.timestamp is a mutable var (settable in tests)
ConfigTransferError is not Equatable - use pattern matching in XCTAssertThrowsError
AnyCodable roundtrip tests need Swift type casts - use (value as? T) not direct comparisons
SensitiveHeaderRedactor.isSensitiveValue is private - test indirectly via redactSensitiveHeaders
TransportMessage custom Codable uses type+payload keyed container; ping/pong encode only type key (no payload)
ISO8601 date round-trips lose sub-second precision - use accuracy:1.0 in assertions
APIKeyValidationDebugSnapshot auto-redacts headers in init via SensitiveHeaderRedactor
OpenClawChatMessage id is String UUID; OpenClawConversation also String UUIDs; ChatMessage id is UUID type - different structs
Date roundtrip for OpenClaw types uses .iso8601 strategy with accuracy:1.0
backlog: Provider metadata/registry tests (Deepgram/RevAI/OpenAI) - SpeakApp-scoped needs macOS CI
